name: EuiFormRow
description: Labeled form field wrapper with error message and help text support.
visualDescription: A vertically stacked form field unit. From top to bottom: a short text label (regular weight, small), the input control (text field, select, etc.), and optionally a one-line helper text or red error message below. The group has consistent vertical spacing. NOT a standalone label (EuiFormRow always wraps an input). In a form with multiple fields, each EuiFormRow is a self-contained label+input+feedback stack.

labelType.description:
Defaults to rendering a `<label>` but if passed `'legend'` for labelType,
will render both a `<legend>` and the surrounding container as a `<fieldset>`

aria-label.description:
Defines a string value that labels the current element.
@see aria-labelledby.

display.description:
- `columnCompressed` creates a compressed and horizontal layout
- `center`/`centerCompressed` helps align non-input content better with inline form layouts
- `rowCompressed` - **deprecated**, does not currently affect styling

hasEmptyLabelSpace.description:
Useful for inline form layouts, primarily for content that
needs to be aligned with inputs but does not need a label

fullWidth.description:
Expand to fill 100% of the parent.
Defaults to `fullWidth` prop of `<EuiForm>`.

describedByIds.description: IDs of additional elements that should be part of children's `aria-describedby`

hasChildLabel.description: Escape hatch to not render duplicate labels if the child also renders a label

children.description: ReactElement to render as this component's content

labelAppend.description:
Adds an extra node to the right of the form label without
being contained inside the form label. Good for things
like documentation links.

helpText.description: Adds a single node/string or an array of nodes/strings below the input

isDisabled.description: Passed along to the label element; and to the child field element when `disabled` doesn't already exist on the child field element.

example: <EuiFormRow label="Text field label" helpText="I am some friendly help text." />
